title: calyptrosciadium rechingeri
intro: Calyptrosciadium rechingeri is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as a wild carrot or a type of umbelliferous plant. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health. Calyptrosciadium rechingeri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed in its raw or dried form.
